## Feature description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Which stage does this improve?

- [ ] Memory (init-deep)
- [ ] Planning (ulw-plan)
- [ ] Execution (start-work)
- [ ] Verification (ulw-loop)
- [ ] Infrastructure (hooks, MCP, agents)
- [ ] Documentation

## Use case

What problem does this solve? What workflow does it improve?

## Proposed approach (optional)

How you think this could work technically.

## Additional context

Any other context.
